name: Battle Strike
description: Increases attack and damage for next attack.

name: Dark Rage
description: Increases melee attack and damage for 1 turn.

name: Farseeing
description: Use The Force to detect an individual over a long distance.

name: Force Disarm
description: Disarms an opponent using The Force.

name: Force Grip
description: Chokes or crushes an opponent, possibly forcing them to lose their standard action.

name: Force Lightning
description: Electrocutes an opponent, dealing automatic damage.

name: Force Slam
description: Pounds multiple opponents and may knock them prone.

name: Force Stun
description: Stuns an opponent and damages their condition.

name: Force Thrust
description: Pushes an opponent back and may deal damage.

name: Mind Trick
description: Influence the mind of a target.

name: Move Object
description: Lift, move, or crush a target using The Force.

name: Negate Energy
description: Dissipate an energy attack.

name: Rebuke
description: Deflect a Force Power used against you.

name: Sever Force
description: Temporarily block a Force user's access to The Force.

name: Surge
description: Enhance movement using The Force.

name: Vital Transfer
description: Heal another through The Force.

name: Energy Resistance
description: Protect yourself from energy, sonic, fire, cold, and electrical damage.

name: Fear
description: Instill fear in enemies using the Dark Side.

name: Force Scream
description: Create an intense sonic scream.

name: Force Whirlwind
description: Lift and spin enemies in a vortex of Force energy.

name: Ionize
description: Overload electrical systems and damage droids.

name: Kinetic Combat
description: Control a weapon with The Force.

name: Resist Force
description: Protect yourself from Force powers.

name: Slow
description: Slow enemies as if encumbered.

name: Valor
description: Empower an ally with strength.

name: Wound
description: Cause internal damage through the Dark Side.

name: Corruption
description: Send dark side energy into an enemy.

name: Force Blast
description: Hurl compressed air and debris.

name: Force Shield
description: Create a protective force bubble.

name: Force Storm
description: Create a swirling storm of dark energy.

name: Repulse
description: Push away all nearby enemies.

name: Cloak
description: Render yourself invisible by bending light.

name: Levitate
description: Float up or down freely.

name: Malacia
description: Cause dizziness and nausea.

name: Morichro
description: Slow vital functions, inducing sleep or death.

name: Phase
description: Pass through solid objects.

name: Rend
description: Move a target in opposing directions.

name: Shatterpoint
description: Identify critical weak points.

name: Technometry
description: Interface with and control technology.

name: Ballistakinesis
description: Spray an area with debris.

name: Combustion
description: Create sparks and fire.

name: Dark Transfer
description: Restore vitality using the Dark Side.

name: Detonate
description: Shatter objects by targeting weak points.

name: Enlighten
description: Grant foresight to an ally.

name: Lightning Burst
description: Arc lightning to multiple enemies.

name: Obscure
description: Cloud an enemy's perception.

name: Prescience
description: Gain insight in combat.

name: Stagger
description: Stumble an enemy.

name: Blind
description: Blind an enemy with debris.

name: Convection
description: Heat your body to extreme levels.

name: Crucitorn
description: Ignore pain and push through damage.

name: Cryokinesis
description: Drain heat from a target.

name: Drain Energy
description: Drain power from devices.

name: Fold Space
description: Instantly transport objects.

name: Force Light
description: Purge Dark Side influence.

name: Force Storm (Advanced)
description: Create a devastating dark side storm.

name: Force Track
description: Track targets through The Force.

name: Hatred
description: Empower yourself with hatred.

name: Inertia
description: Manipulate your body's inertia.

name: Inspire
description: Bolster allies' morale.

name: Intercept
description: Block incoming projectiles.

name: Memory Walk
description: Force a target to relive traumatic memories.

name: Mind Shard
description: Damage a target's mind.

name: Plant Surge
description: Animate plants to attack enemies.

name: Thought Bomb
description: Release psychic energy damaging nearby foes.

name: Assured Strike
description: You trade power for accuracy.

name: Barrier of Blades
description: You whip your Lightsaber around you, creating a barrier through which blaster fire rarely penetrates.

name: Circle of Shelter
description: You create a protected area around yourself, through which enemies have difficulty reaching you or your allies.

name: Contentious Opportunity
description: You seize the moment when your opponent gives you an opening, darting in to strike.

name: Deflecting Slash
description: You use the momentum from your effort to deflect a projectile to strike at an adjacent opponent.

name: Disarming Slash
description: You strike at your opponent's weapon, attempting to rip it from their grasp.

name: Draw Closer
description: You grab an opponent with The Force, drawing him or her into the path of your weapon.

name: Falling Avalanche
description: You raise your Lightsaber above your head and then bring it crashing down on your opponent with incredible force.

name: Fluid Riposte
description: You smoothly turn aside an opponent's melee attack, stepping in to deliver your own attack.

name: Hawk-Bat Swoop
description: You leap into action against your foe, striking with your Lightsaber before other enemies have a chance to react.

name: High Ground Defense
description: You know how to take advantage of the terrain and gain a defensive advantage from it.

name: Makashi Riposte
description: You are trained in a Makashi technique that allows you to slightly change the angle of an opponent's attack before striking with a decisive riposte of your own.

name: Pass the Blade
description: You deactivate your Lightsaber as your opponent attempts to block it, reactivating it just after it passes by their blade.

name: Pushing Slash
description: You strike at your target with your Lightsaber, then hurl them away from you with The Force.

name: Rising Whirlwind
description: You swing your Lightsabers around your body, creating a brilliant whirlwind of deadly light.

name: Saber Swarm
description: You slash at your opponent rapidly, aiming many short strikes at the target's body.

name: Sarlacc Sweep
description: You lash out at multiple enemies, striking them with a sweeping motion.

name: Shien Deflection
description: You deflect an incoming attack and leap toward your attacker with fierce abandon.

name: Swift Flank
description: You leap over or dash around your opponent, striking before they have time to react.

name: Tempered Aggression
description: You throw yourself against an opponent, controlling your aggression to prevent it from getting the better of you.

name: Twin Strike
description: You swing both of your Lightsabers in an arc toward the target, slamming them home with great force.

name: Unbalancing Block
description: You catch an opponent's weapon on your blade before deactivating your blade momentarily, causing them to stumble.

name: Unhindered Charge
description: You move quickly to your opponent, ignoring Difficult Terrain and obstacles.

name: Vornskr's Ferocity
description: You walk the thin line between darkness and light as you ferociously attack your foe.
